title: Advanced Angular
subtitle: Custom directives, CDK, functional interceptors, and zoneless Angular
description: The advanced topics that appear in senior Angular interviews: custom structural directives with TemplateRef, the Angular CDK, functional interceptors, advanced template patterns with ng-template, and Angular's experimental zoneless mode.
learningOutcomes: Build custom structural directives using TemplateRef and ViewContainerRef
Write performant stateful pipes and explain their caching behavior
Implement functional HTTP interceptors with the modern HttpInterceptorFn
Use Angular CDK overlay and a11y utilities
Configure and understand experimental zoneless change detection
Use ng-template, TemplateRef, and ngTemplateOutlet for advanced composition
